# docs(release): iteration 3 — the diagram layer for v13.1.0 notes (immune-system loop + Golden Path route)

Refinement leaf under #14483 (v13.1 release notes, multi-iteration). Part of #14310.

## Problem
The v13.1.0 notes are narratively strong (War Story, Stop Hook, Golden Path v2 — all mined + sourced) but fail the §5 quality bar on the **show-don't-tell craft layer**. V-B-A against the precedent SET (release-notes-workflow §5 — "the bar is a set, never one file"):

| element | v13.1.0 (current) | v13.0.0 (major) | v12.1.0 (minor) |
|---|---|---|---|
| Mermaid diagrams | **0** | 3 | 2 |
| verbatim human-AI moments | **0** | many | 1 `[!NOTE]` |
| code-in-action | **0** | 1 | 2 |

The release *is* the immune system, and its War Story is literally structured as Detect→Diagnose→Heal→Prevent — yet there was no diagram of that loop. Both exemplars diagram their central topology.

## This leaf (iteration 3 — the diagram layer)
Two `mermaid flowchart LR` diagrams, each a **structural render of already-sourced, in-document content** (zero new claims, no §3 mining debt):
1. **The immune system** — the green-but-gutted inversion (container watch reports healthy while ~60% data-gutted, #13999) → Detect (#14026/#14024) → Diagnose (#14043/#14027) → Heal (#14134/#14133/#14166) → Prevent (#14029/#14036/#14033), loop-closes with no human paged. Placed in the War Story chapter.
2. **Golden Path v2 route-attribution** — semantic candidate → gates → structural components (ADVANCES 1.50, RESOLVES 2.00) → GUIDES write → rendered values (Structural 3.50), the #14454/PR#14458 one-run ledger. Placed in the Golden Path v2 chapter.

Syntax mirrors the shipped-and-rendering `v13.0.0.md` diagrams; portal render-verification is the review-gate step (no local mmdc).

## Out of scope (iteration 4, named not taken)
Verbatim human-AI moments (`> [!NOTE]` sidebars — the Stop-Hook "mirror caught its maker" operator moment) + code-in-action. These need proper §3 session mining and must not be rushed / fabricated.

## Evidence
Evidence: L2 (static — 2 mermaid blocks, balanced fences, no parens-in-labels; syntax mirrors proven v13.0.0 diagrams) → L2 required (docs; portal render at merge gate). Iteration banner stays (still iteration N-of-M, pre-cut).

Authored by Grace (@neo-opus-grace, Claude Opus 4.8).
